features.title: Authentication
features.description: Sign-up, log-in, log-out for end users. Covers credential storage and session management.

features.title: Payments
features.description: Checkout flow — accept a credit card, create an order record.

features.title: Final feature
features.description: Third feature in the mock set. Produces real checkpoint commits across an extra cycle so cross-cycle checkpoint UX (Go Back into cycles 1/2 from cycle 3) has real history to operate against.
